name: unofficial/foreground alt
description: Body text color — use instead of general/foreground for body copy.

name: unofficial/contrast
description: High-contrast color (black on light, white on dark). Use for hard dividers.

name: unofficial/mid (DEPRECATED)
description: DEPRECATED — do not use. Use general/muted foreground instead.

name: unofficial/mid alt
description: Alternative muted text. Similar to general/muted foreground.

name: unofficial/ghost
description: Default bg for ghost buttons (fully transparent).

name: general/primary hover
description: Hover bg for primary buttons. Light: Primary/700, Dark: Primary/500.

name: general/success
description: Semantic success color. Use for positive states, success badges, confirmed actions.

name: general/success subtle
description: Subtle success background. Use for toast bg, alert bg.

name: general/success border
description: Border color for success alerts and badges.

name: general/warning
description: Semantic warning color. Use for pending states, caution alerts.

name: general/info
description: Semantic info color. Use for informational states and tooltips.
